name: truecalling-mcp-server
description: MCP server exposing TrueCalling operations (candidates, JDs, scoring, enrichment, Emily, WhatsApp, psy, reports) to Claude Code via stdio.

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts --format esm --target node20 --out-dir dist --clean && chmod +x dist/index.js
scripts.inspect: npm run build && npx @modelcontextprotocol/inspector node --env-file-if-exists=.env dist/index.js
